# task\-phase9\-migration\-guide — Write migration guide for importing other task systems
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-core
readiness: not_eligible  reason: status_done

Document how humans and LLM agents should migrate tasks/issues/comments from other task management systems into Waystation's JSON ledger\. Include mapping guidance, validation flow, review strategy, and examples for common source systems\.

## Acceptance
- A docs/migration\-guide\.md file explains the migration workflow end to end\.
- The guide covers concept mapping for tasks, issues, comments/messages, assignees/claims, statuses, labels, priorities, dependencies, and scopes\.
- The guide includes a review checklist and commands to reindex, validate, regenerate reports, and inspect samples\.
- README links to the migration guide\.
- waystation validate is clean after adding the guide task and docs\.
